pages.text: There are six frog species - Cave, Geode, Bog, Tide, Infernal, and Void. Each species only eats slimes of its own kind, and each kind covers a family of resources.$(br2)So variety lives on the slime side: one species of frog handles many resources, as long as the slime matches.
To get a frog of a species, prime vanilla frogspawn with that species' primer item, then let it hatch and grow. A bottled Frog Egg works the same way. The species is locked in for life.
